Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model

Class Grant

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Grant
public class Grant extends Object
Represents a grant received by the nonprofit organization. This class stores details about the grant such as its ID, the grantor, amount, date awarded, purpose, and current status.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    (package private) BigDecimal
    amount
    The monetary amount of the grant.
    (package private) String
    dateAwarded
    The date when the grant was awarded, typically in a string format (e.g., "YYYY-MM-DD").
    (package private) String
    grantId
    The unique identifier for the grant.
    (package private) String
    grantor
    The name of the organization or individual who awarded the grant.
    (package private) String
    purpose
    The specific purpose or project for which the grant was awarded.
    (package private) String
    status
    The current status of the grant (e.g., "Awarded", "Pending", "Completed", "Closed").

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • Grant

      public Grant()
      Default constructor required for Jackson deserialization.

    • Grant

      public Grant(String grantId, String grantor, BigDecimal amount, String dateAwarded, String purpose, String status)
      Constructs a new Grant with specified details.
      Parameters:
      grantId - The unique identifier for the grant.
      grantor - The name of the grantor.
      amount - The monetary amount of the grant.
      dateAwarded - The date the grant was awarded.
      purpose - The purpose of the grant.
      status - The current status of the grant.
